indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no chair or seating arrangement suitable for extended computer use.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be ambient and does not provide sufficient task illumination for screen work.

indicators.name: no dedicated workspace layout
indicators.rationale: The space is open and lacks a dedicated area for focused work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is largely unsuitable for computer work (solo). The lack of a flat work surface, ergonomic seating, task lighting, and a dedicated workspace layout makes it difficult to set up a productive workstation. The presence of a bench and potted plant suggests a more casual, less work-focused environment.
